title: MATANA 20 Premium Square White Plastic Dessert Plates with Gold Rim, 16.5cm / 6.5 Inch - Reusable Small Side Plates, Starter Plates for Weddings, Birthdays, Picnic, BBQ, Parties
features: ELEGANT: Indulge in sophistication with our Premium Square White Plastic Dessert Plates featuring a stunning Gold Rim, adding an elegant touch to any occasion. Make lasting memories at your special events and gatherings with these small, yet impactful plates.

VERSATILE: These small plates are perfect for presenting a wide range of delectable delights, including desserts, sides, starters, and appetizers. Their versatility is ideal for showcasing everything from decadent cakes to gourmet sliders, ensuring your culinary creations look as good as they taste.

PERFECT FOR ANY OCCASION: These square dessert plates are incredibly versatile. They are ideal for a wide range of events, from the most formal and elegant gatherings like weddings, baby showers, birthdays, and Christmas celebrations to casual family BBQs, picnics in the park, and laid-back garden parties.

CONTEMPORARY SQUARE DESIGN: Embrace modern aesthetics with our square design that adds a touch of sophistication to your table settings. The sharp, clean lines of the reusable plates provide an aesthetically pleasing backdrop for your culinary creations.

REUSABLE & EASY TO CLEAN: We understand the importance of sustainability, which is why our plates are created to be reused without sacrificing style. To maintain the elegant gold rim, simply hand wash these plates, ensuring they continue to shine and elevate your table settings for countless gatherings to come.
description: Introducing our 20 Premium Square White Plastic Dessert Plates with Gold Rim, the epitome of sophistication and style for your special occasions. Crafted with meticulous attention to detail, these small plates are designed to elevate your events and create lasting memories. The contemporary square design of these dessert plates brings a modern touch to your table decor. The clean lines and captivating gold rim transform your culinary creations into true works of art. Whether you're serving desserts, sides, starters, or appetizers, these party plates provide a visually appealing canvas. Our small square plates offer exceptional versatility, making them suitable for a wide array of occasions. From the most formal events like weddings, Christmas celebrations, and baby showers to relaxed family BBQs, picnics, and garden parties, these plastic plates adapt effortlessly to the ambiance. Maintaining the captivating gold rim is a breeze with simple hand washing. This extra step ensures that your investment in these elegant, sturdy, and reusable plates continues to pay off, creating unforgettable moments for every occasion.

specifications_table.Special Features: ‎BPA Free, Break Resistant, Durability, Lightweight, Reusable
